title: Secure HR Analytics (FAB Bank)
overview: HR dashboards implementing strict row-level security mapping, ensuring managers only see data for their direct reports while aggregating high-level trends for leadership.
challenge: Sensitive compensation and performance data required strict multi-tenant row-level access control across 5,000+ bank employees.
solution: Joined transaction tables to an Active Directory security entitlement mapping table in Oracle SQL using dynamic USERNAME() Tableau calculations.
archExplanation: Oracle SQL database views resolve employee entitlement trees; Tableau evaluates dynamic USERNAME() security filters on load.
impact: Zero security breach incidents across 5 years
Streamlined executive reporting for bank leadership
learnings: User security tables must be indexed on lower(username) for instant evaluation
Cache security entitlements locally on Tableau Server
